chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-357 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Shahryar I Awan, Assistant Advocate General Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Adnan Arshad, SPPs NAB a/w Assistant Director/IO NAB ***************** The Investigating Officer is present before the Court and submits that, pursuant to the application moved by the petitioner, an inquiry has already been initiated by the competent authority. It is further stated that the said inquiry has been conducted strictly in accordance with law and has now been finalized. In view of the above statement, it is apparent that the grievance raised by the petitioner in the instant Constitution Petition stands substantially redressed. The relief sought in the prayer clause of the petition has, thus, been effectively satisfied. Consequently, the instant Constitution Petition has lost its efficacy and utility and has, therefore, become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is disposed of being infructuous. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
